response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with deep web/backend experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), but the role demands hardware-level expertise: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architecture, deep-learning workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no evidence of GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture work, DNN training/inference optimization, or silicon-level performance analysis. The brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments and embedded mentions do not approach Principal-level hardware architecture experience required.
strengths: Long track record of performance-sensitive backend work (low-latency DLang microservices at Sociomantic handling millions of req/s)
Strong software engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, and craftsmanship
Some C/C++ exposure via National Instruments LabWindows/CVI and embedded systems mention
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience anywhere in the resume
No demonstrated work on AI accelerators, GPUs, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization
Educational background (BS CS + BS Fine Arts) does not meet the PhD+3 / MS+6 / BS+8 in a relevant hardware/architecture field with matching experience
